changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 18 18:00): ZERO de-escalation signals. Iran FM calls diplomacy 'delusional'. Hormuz effectively blockaded. Israel wide-scale strikes on Tehran. Lebanon ground invasion expanding. Oil >$100. No ceasefire in ANY theater.

latest_news.headline: Al Jazeera confirms 1,444 killed, 18,551 injured in Iran (Day 18)
latest_news.text: Updated toll: 1,444 killed and 18,551 injured by US-Israeli attacks since Feb 28. School strike in Minab (170+ girls) confirmed by Amnesty.

latest_news.headline: Germany's Merz calls Israel's Lebanon ground offensive an 'error'
latest_news.text: German Chancellor Merz warns Israeli ground offensive in Lebanon will 'further exacerbate humanitarian situation'. Major Western leader pushback.

latest_news.headline: Japan begins releasing strategic oil reserves as Hormuz crisis deepens
latest_news.text: Japan starts releasing strategic oil reserves per IEA guidance. Brent at $106, up ~50% since war began. Global energy crisis deepening.

latest_news.headline: Trump calls Iran 'paper tiger', demands NATO 'enthusiasm' on Hormuz
latest_news.text: Trump escalates rhetoric: 'paper tiger we're dealing with'. Pressures UK/France for Hormuz help. European leaders reject troop deployments.

latest_news.headline: NATO to bolster missile defense at Turkey's Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: NATO reinforcing ballistic missile defense capacity at Incirlik against Iranian threats. 3 ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey during war.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 18, 23:04 UTC) — War continues across 5 active theaters. 1,444 killed in Iran, 18,551 wounded. 1M+ displaced in Lebanon. Brent $106. Japan releases oil reserves. Germany opposes Lebanon ground offensive. Trump goes unilateral on Hormuz. No ceasefire signals in any theater. NATO bolsters Incirlik defenses.

predictions.description: Strait of Hormuz expected to remain under Iranian blockade. Additional shipping attacks probable within 12 hours.
Israeli ground operation in southern Lebanon expected to continue beyond Litani River. Further displacement and infrastructure destruction likely.
Status quo maintained. No PLA activity changes detected. Taiwan Strait remains stable.
Afghan-Pakistan border tensions likely to persist. Additional clashes probable based on recent trajectory.
